heading: Application of Securities Exchange Act of 1934
label: 78bbb Application of Securities Exchange Act of 1934
text: Except as otherwise provided in this chapter, the provisions of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 [ et seq.] (hereinafter referred to as the “1934 Act”) apply as if this chapter constituted an amendment to, and was included as a section of, such Act.15 U.S.C. 78a
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Pub.
